title: Welcome to the feed!
body:
This is where I'll post **devlogs, updates and news** across all my games.

Posts tagged with a game also show up on that game's page. More soon!

title: Battle43 — new vehicle update
body:
Working on adding new **drivable vehicles** to Battle43, plus some fixes to the capture-point system.

- New tank handling
- Smoother first-person transitions
- Capture-point UI polish

title: Just Drive is getting a new version
body: I've started rebuilding Just Drive in UEFN with a bigger open world and proper car upgrades. Stay tuned!
